HomePage.title: Optimize Your Resume with AI
HomePage.hero-description: Upload your resume and paste a job description. Our AI will tailor your resume to improve ATS compatibility and increase interview chances.

features.title: Why Choose Our AI Resume Optimizer?

feature1.title: ATS Friendly
feature1.description: Improve compatibility with modern applicant tracking systems.

feature2.title: AI Optimization
feature2.description: Match keywords and skills directly to the job description.

feature3.title: Professional Results
feature3.description: Get cleaner and more impactful resume content.

pricing.3: You can cancel at any time no questions asked

generate-resume.title: AI Resume Enhancer
generate-resume.description: Paste your current resume below and get an improved, professional rewrite resume.
generate-resume.job-description-hint: Works great with content pasted from LinkedIn or other job boards.
generate-resume.helper: Your enhanced resume will appear here.

cover-letter.title: AI Cover Letter Generator
cover-letter.description: Instantly generate tailored cover letters from any job description.
cover-letter.job-description-hint: Works great with content pasted from LinkedIn or other job boards.
cover-letter.role-placeholder: Role you're applying for (Software Engineer, Product Manager, etc.)
cover-letter.helper: Your enhanced cover letter will appear here.
